creator: rezny@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 180518
update net-p2p/qbittorrent to 3.3.11

Update qBittorrent to 3.3.11.
Remove post-patch which is unneeded and not working for QT4 after the recent QT update; let qtchooser do its job.
Remove the patch added in the last update now that libtorrent-rasterbar 1.1.2 is released.
Add a couple patches from upstream to fix building with QT4. Build with verified with QT4 and QT5 options.
